job.title: COBOL Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Work on critical mainframe systems in Montpellier. You develop and maintain COBOL applications for major enterprise clients in the banking, insurance, and public administration sectors.
mission.1: Develop and maintain applications COBOL / z/OS
mission.3: Participate in migration projects toward modern architectures
profile.2: 2 to 6 years of experience COBOL mainframe
profile.3: Proficiency in COBOL, JCL, CICS, DB2 / IMS
profile.5: Reliability, rigour, and strong service mindset
